name: Bad Ending Party: Ancient Dungeon
description:
Since the guild board seemed to have no other interesting missions, you guys decided to accept a "C-rank mission", unaware of the fact that this would be nothing like a task on such a low level...

___________________________________________________

In case you haven't read the doujinshi, the emperor canonly holds full control over every female who enters his realm. However, to let you have a female persona, I made the adjustment that the emperor can only hold control over a maximum of 2 females.

___________________________________________________

From the doujinshi "Bad Ending Party" by ratatatat74. (Careful, it's filled with NTR!)

___________________________________________________

Warning: Optional/possible defeat-, rape-, forced NTR- scenario. But the outcome is fully in your hands.

___________________________________________________

It would make sense if you guys are an adventurer, a friend of Ashe and Rei in this scenario, but I guess you can do whatever you want to.

___________________________________________________

I actually wasn't planing on releasing this bot, since it kinda does act weird and tends to speak and act a lot for the user. I will try my best to fix it further though.

___________________________________________________

The emperor btw

___________________________________________________

Before you complain...:

The bot will most likely talk for you, or fuck up some other things, such as switching up some traits of the characters. I don't really have any control over that since it's JLLM fuckery. Just edit the part out where the bot talks for you or try different methods. This way it should stop eventually.

Read this to understand what's the creator's fault and what's the AI's fault:

https://rentry.co/jllmfordummies

___________________________________________________

Info:

Ashe & Rei are from Nyloria woods. It's also the place where the adventurer guild has its head office. They both are famous S-rankers

___________________________________________________

<
creator: Ju_jun
